sources.title: AI-Powered Smart Grid Market Research Report 2026: $12.79 Bn Opportunities
sources.key_claim: AI-Powered Smart Grid Market valued at $7.54B in 2026, projected to reach $12.79B by 2030 at 14.1% CAGR

sources.title: AI in Energy Market Size to Hit USD 75.53 Billion by 2034
sources.key_claim: AI in Energy market reaches $21.22B in 2026 with 17.20% CAGR through 2034

sources.title: 2024 United States Data Center Energy Usage Report
sources.key_claim: US data centers consumed 183 TWh of electricity in 2024, representing more than 4% of total US electricity consumption

sources.title: Strategic Federal Actions Aim to Strengthen AI and Energy Infrastructure
sources.key_claim: White House Ratepayer Protection Pledge signed March 4, 2026 by 7 AI companies committing to self-supply power for data centers

sources.title: Smart Grid Software 2026, $52B Market, FERC Rulemaking
sources.key_claim: FERC set June 2026 deadline for large-load interconnection rulemaking; Smart Grid Software market at $52B in 2026

sources.title: US Energy Management Market: Smart Grids, AI, and the IRA Are Rewriting the Industry
sources.key_claim: IRA $369B investment; DOE Grid Modernization Initiative $10.5B; AI grid management saves 15-25% operational costs for utilities

sources.title: Is power grid connectivity the strategic bottleneck for AI?
sources.key_claim: Electrical grid connectivity identified as strategic bottleneck for AI transformation globally; power availability exceeds compute as primary constraint

sources.title: GE Vernova to acquire Alteia, advancing AI-enabled GridOS Visual Intelligence software
sources.key_claim: GE Vernova acquired AI software firm Alteia in July 2025 to integrate visual intelligence and AI workflows into GridOS platform

sources.title: Utilidata Announces Development of a Custom Module for AI at the Edge of the Grid
sources.key_claim: Utilidata and NVIDIA developing NVIDIA Jetson-powered AI module for real-time intelligence at grid edge (transformers, meters)

sources.title: AI 2026: Data Centers Restart Growth of a Stagnant U.S. Electrical Grid
sources.key_claim: US utility 5-year peak demand forecasts grew from 38 GW (2023) to 128 GW (2024) — a 237% surge in planning horizons in 12 months

sources.title: Energy demand from AI — Analysis
sources.key_claim: IEA projects AI data center electricity demand to exceed 250 TWh globally in 2026; global demand will rise 1T+ kWh/year through 2030

sources.title: US Utilities Invest $1.1T by 2030 for AI & Electrification
sources.key_claim: US utilities committed to $1.1T in grid investment by 2030 driven by electrification and AI infrastructure demand

sources.title: AI-Powered Smart Grid Market Report 2026 - Research and Markets
sources.key_claim: Top 5 smart grid players (Siemens, GE Vernova, Schneider Electric, ABB, Itron) hold approximately 45% combined market share in North America

sources.title: NERC outage minutes decrease 29% in predictive load balancing systems
sources.key_claim: NERC-reported outage minutes decreased by 29% in systems implementing AI predictive load balancing vs traditional grid management
sources.note: [unverified — referenced in multiple secondary sources but NERC primary source not directly confirmed]

notes: growth_3m value of '+45% YoY' is an estimate based on Q1/Q2 2026 investment acceleration signals, not a directly sourced figure

Market share percentages for individual companies (GE Vernova 18%, Siemens 15%, etc.) are estimates derived from the '45% combined for top 5' figure from GM Insights, distributed based on reported revenue and deployment scale
NERC 29% outage reduction statistic appears in multiple secondary sources but the primary NERC report URL was not directly confirmed — flagged accordingly
AutoGrid was acquired by Enel in 2021 (not 2024 as initially misremembered — corrected in the report)
